description_long: This is a classic sandwich made with two thick slices of white bread, enclosing layers of fresh green lettuce, slices of ripe red tomato, and several folded pieces of deli turkey or chicken. The bread appears soft and slightly airy, with a golden-brown crust on the bottom and sides. The lettuce is crisp and peeks out from the edges, adding a vibrant green contrast to the sandwich. The tomato slices are juicy and thick, providing a bright red accent in the middle. The meat is pale pink and thinly sliced, stacked generously between the vegetables. The sandwich is unwrapped and presented plainly, with no visible condiments or packaging.
description: A thick white bread sandwich filled with lettuce, tomato, and sliced deli meat, showing fresh and vibrant layers. The bread is soft and airy, with a golden crust and no visible packaging.
description_view_0: Side view showing all sandwich layers: white bread, green lettuce, red tomato, and sliced deli meat.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the thickness of the bread and the protruding lettuce and tomato.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the plain white bread slice, with minimal filling visible.
description_view_3: Angled top view showing the bread's texture and a hint of the sandwich filling beneath.
